ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., stock, forex, futures) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the market */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the market */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market where the stock is traded */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_data" (
  "trading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading event */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "bid" REAL /* Bid price of the stock */,
  "ask" REAL /* Ask price of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the sentiment analysis event */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the stock */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading volume event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being traded */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trading volume event */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Number of shares traded */,
  "volume_type" TEXT /* Type of volume (buy, sell, total) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_volumes_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technical indicator event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being analyzed */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the technical indicator event */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the technical indicator */,
  "indicator_type" TEXT /* Type of indicator (momentum, trend, volatility) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_indicators_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the machine learning model */,
  "model_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the machine learning model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the machine learning model making the prediction */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock being predicted */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the prediction event */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted price of the stock */,
  "conf_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, trader) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news event */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news event */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news event */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news event */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert event */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock triggering the alert */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the alert event */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price movement, volume spike) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user creating the strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the trading strategy */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of trading strategy (e.g., mean reversion, trend following) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_strategies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backtesting_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backtesting result */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy being backtested */,
  "backtest_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the backtesting event */,
  "performance" REAL /* Performance of the trading strategy */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit/loss of the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backtesting_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management event */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy being monitored */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the risk management event */,
  "risk_metric" REAL /* Value of the risk metric */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_management_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance event */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trading strategy being monitored */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the compliance event */,
  "compliance_metric" REAL /* Value of the compliance metric */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "initial_investment" REAL /* Initial investment in the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance event */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the portfolio being monitored */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the performance event */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the portfolio */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES user_portfolio ("portfolio_id")
)
